repomix.directory_structure: scripts/ __tests__/ derive-evaluations.test.ts judge-evaluations.test.ts pipeline-integration.test.ts sync-prioritization.test.ts sync-to-kv.test.ts useQualityLive.test.tsx vite-web-worker-stub.test.ts workflow-fixtures.ts workflow-graph.test.ts WorkflowGraph.test.tsx WorkflowPage.test.tsx WorkflowTimeline.test.tsx api/ routes/ agents.ts EvaluationExpandedRow.tsx EvaluationTable.tsx ExpandChevron.tsx FreqBar.tsx FreqBarGrid.tsx HandoffCard.tsx HealthBanner.tsx HealthOverview.tsx Indicators.tsx IssueCallout.tsx Layout.tsx MetaItem.tsx MetricCard.tsx MetricCompare.tsx MetricGrid.tsx MonoTableHead.tsx PageShell.tsx PipelineFunnel.tsx ProvenancePanel.tsx QualityLiveIndicator.tsx RequireAuth.tsx RoleSelector.tsx ScoreBadge.tsx ScoreHistogram.tsx Section.tsx SectionBlock.tsx ShortcutOverlay.tsx SimpleAlertList.tsx SLATable.tsx SpanTree.tsx Sparkline.tsx SplitPane.tsx StatDisplay.tsx TimestampCell.tsx TrendChart.tsx TrendSeries.tsx TruncatedIdLink.tsx TruncatedList.tsx TurnTimeline.tsx WorkflowGraph.tsx WorkflowTimeline.tsx context/ CalibrationContext.tsx contexts/ AuthContext.tsx KeyboardNavContext.tsx RoleContext.tsx hooks/ useAgentSession.ts useAgentStats.ts useApiQuery.ts useCalibration.ts useCompliance.ts useCoverage.ts useDashboard.ts useMetricDetail.ts useMetricEvaluations.ts usePipeline.ts useQualityLive.ts useRoutingTelemetry.ts useSessionDetail.ts useTrace.ts useTraceEvaluations.ts useTrend.ts lib/ validation/ auth-schemas.ts dashboard-schemas.ts activity-logger.ts auth0.ts constants.ts dashboard-file-utils.ts quality-utils.ts routes.ts supabase-rest.ts supabase.ts symbols.ts workflow-graph.ts pages/ AdminPage.tsx AgentSessionPage.tsx AgentsPage.tsx CompliancePage.tsx CorrelationsPage.tsx CoveragePage.tsx EvaluationDetailPage.tsx LoginPage.tsx PipelinePage.tsx RoutingTelemetryPage.tsx SessionDetailPage.tsx TraceDetailPage.tsx WorkflowPage.tsx stubs/ web-worker.ts git_log_commit.message: refactor(judge,auth): replace magic numbers with constants and fix Auth0 redirect URI
refactor(judge): clean up dead code and extract toolContext variable
test(auth,constants): add regression tests for auth0 env validation and API_BASE double-path bug
ci: use explicit doppler secrets get to avoid dev config localhost URL
ci: restore --config dev for doppler run (token updated in GitHub secrets)
ci: drop explicit doppler project/config flags, use token implicit scope
refactor(components): extract shared helpers, replace magic numbers, and consolidate CSS
chore(docs): regenerate repomix snapshots and token tree
fix(vite,ci): use doppler run + process.env merge to embed VITE_* vars in build
refactor(api): extract computePeriodDates helper and remove duplicate wrappers
fix(vite): use mode-based loadEnv + define block to embed VITE_* vars in build
ci: write .env file before build to ensure Vite picks up VITE_* vars
feat(hooks): add Auth0 bearer token to session detail and trace fetches
docs(auth): update README and roadmap for Auth0 migration completion
ci: fix Auth0 env var injection using export statements
chore: add .npmrc with legacy-peer-deps for eslint 10 compat
ci: pass Auth0 env vars from Doppler to Pages build step
docs(roadmap): mark Auth0 tenant setup and Post-Login Action done
docs(auth0): mark migration complete, add tenant deploy script
feat(auth): migrate frontend and worker auth from Supabase to Auth0
feat(auth): migrate worker JWT verification from Supabase to Auth0 JWKS
chore(backlog): mark CR-TS-2/3/4/5, CR-ERR-1/2/3/4, CR-PERF-1/2/3, CR-AUTH-1/2, CR-STYLE-1 Done
fix(workflow-graph): replace double-cast with isWorkflowNode type guard
test(workflow-graph): update stress test for MAX_ELK_NODES degraded fallback
fix(activity): add dev-mode console.warn for swallowed audit log failures
fix(style): extract inline styles from workflow components to theme.css classes
fix(workflow-graph): cap ELK layout at MAX_ELK_NODES to prevent main-thread block
fix(timeline): cap visible turns at MAX_VISIBLE_TURNS to bound SVG size
fix(workflow-graph): remove setNodes/setEdges from useEffect dep array
fix(admin): replace numeric mutation counter with Set<string> of in-flight IDs
fix(workflow-graph): guard against null/missing turns before buildFromEvaluation
fix(agents): replace unsafe attribute casts with typeof narrowing
fix(sessions): guard timestamp parsing to prevent NaN corrupting tsMin/tsMax
fix(auth): add ref-count to auto-refresh timer to prevent Strict Mode timer leaks
fix(worker): safe JSON casts, Zod error logging, admin roles-fetch failure handling
refactor(dashboard): code review fixes — constants, auth middleware, workflow graph
fix(workflow): remove unused LANE_PADDING_BOTTOM constant (lint)
chore(backlog): mark G5-A, G5-B, G5-D Done; document G5-E bundle audit findings
feat(sessions): add multi-agent badge in session detail header (G5-D)
feat(workflow): add WorkflowTimeline swimlane + AgentWorkflowView dual-tab (G5-A, G5-B)
fix(comment): correct gen_gi typo to gen_ai in sessions.ts WG-C1 note
chore(backlog): mark implemented items as Done
docs(worker): document admin route error handling policy (ADMIN-P4-3)
fix(agents): check both agent.name and gen_gi.agent.name when building agentMap (G5-C1)
docs(types): document durationMs double-counting limitation on WorkflowNode (G5-WG9)
feat(workflow): add droppedTurns observability counter to WorkflowGraph (G5-WG5)
fix(workflow): add epsilon tolerance to span-sequence edge inference (G5-M2)
fix(types): WorkflowEdge.handoffScore typed as number | null (G5-M4)
feat(auth): add proactive auto-refresh timer to AuthContext
chore(backlog): mark AUTH-P3-1 through TF-3 as done
refactor(test): consolidate inline WorkflowGraph literals to use makeGraph (TF-1/TF-2)
fix(workflow): DFS cycle detection in classifyShape for 3+ node cycles (G5-M1)
fix(admin): add concurrent mutation guard to AdminPage (ADMIN-P4-2)
fix(admin): AdminUserSchema accepts users without email (ADMIN-P4-1)
refactor(auth): extract Supabase REST client helpers to supabase-rest.ts (AUTH-P4-1)
refactor(auth): make authUserId/appUserId optional in AppSession (AUTH-P3-3)
refactor(auth): unify DashboardView/RoleViewType aliases, derive VALID_ROLES from schema
chore(deps): migrate Zod schemas to v4 API
chore(deps): upgrade TypeScript to 6.0.2
chore(deps): upgrade eslint 10, fix eslint 10 breaking changes
refactor(test): extract shared workflow graph fixtures
chore(deps): upgrade vite 8, plugin-react 6, error-boundary 6, minor bumps
fix(worker): resolve activity logging test mock exhaustion
fix(validation): remove invalid argument from .strict() in otelEvaluationRecordSchema
refactor(date-fns): replace native Date APIs with date-fns utilities
feat(activity-logging): add login/logout activity logging and POST /api/logout endpoint
test(workflow-graph): add G5 stress tests for layout stability (ST-G5)
docs(worker): document RLS policy requirement for logActivity (FU-AUTH-RLS-VERIFY)
feat(routing-telemetry): render providerDistribution table (FU-R8-DASH-PROVIDER)
fix(routing-telemetry): add Zod KV validation, guard division by zero, tighten type guard
feat(routing-telemetry): add /api/routing-telemetry endpoint and dashboard page (FU-R8-DASH)
feat(backtest): seed .degradation-incidents.json with 5 confirmed historical incidents (FU-FE-R5-INCIDENT)
fix(backtest): address code review findings — Zod validation, path traversal, O(n²) fix
feat(backtest): add degradation detector backtest orchestration script (FU-FE-R5-SCRIPT)
refactor(scripts): add Zod validation to sync-to-kv.ts
feat: integrate validated file I/O with Zod schemas
refactor(activity): consolidate activity logging patterns into shared module
docs(backlog): add integration test item for production-aligned E2E testing
docs(e2e): clarify Supabase env var handling in E2E tests
fix(e2e): resolve blank page and session validation failures
chore(scripts): update kv-sync coverage metrics
chore(dashboard): add e2e auth fixtures and react-compiler dependency
test(e2e): use custom auth fixtures for all page tests
Revert "refactor(react-compiler): switch to annotation mode for table compatibility"
docs: add comprehensive environment configuration guide
refactor(react-compiler): switch to annotation mode for table compatibility
test(lint): replace any types with proper interfaces and Zod schemas in test mocks
fix(lint): fix setState in effect errors
fix(lint): remove unused variables
fix(lint): fix React hooks rules violations
test: add test-mode auth bypass and provide Bearer test-token in API tests
test: add .env.test with test Supabase credentials and load in vite config
ci: use official doppler action for env var setup
ci: use doppler to inject Supabase env vars in test step
fix(FU-AUTH-UNUSED-TYPE): remove unused ActivityRequest type export
docs(backlog): add Phase 4 admin code review deferred items (ADMIN-P4-1 through ADMIN-P4-3)
docs(admin): mark admin tooling for role/permission assignment done in Phase 4 roadmap
fix(admin): address code review findings — frontend guard and service role headers
feat(admin): add admin tooling for role/permission assignment (Phase 4)
docs(auth): mark login/logout activity logging done in Phase 4 roadmap

repomix.instruction:
# Quality Metrics Dashboard
React 19 + Vite 8 dashboard with Hono API, backed by a Cloudflare Worker. Displays 7 quality metrics derived from Claude Code session telemetry. Auth: Auth0 Universal Login with role-based access control backed by Supabase DB.
## Commands
```bash npm run dev # Vite + Hono API on :3001 npm test # Vitest npm run typecheck # tsc --noEmit npm run build # Production build npm run populate -- --seed # Data pipeline (offline) npm run deploy:worker # Deploy Cloudflare Worker ```
## Architecture
- **Frontend**: `src/` — React 19 + Vite 8, React Router, Auth0 React SDK (`@auth0/auth0-react`) - **API server**: `src/api/` — Hono server on :3001, reads from Cloudflare KV via worker - **Worker**: `worker/index.ts` — Auth0 JWKS JWT verification via `jose`, KV read-through cache, protected `/api/*` routes - **Auth**: Auth0 Universal Login + role-based permissions from Supabase `user_roles -> roles.permissions` (all DB access via service role key) - **Validation**: Zod schemas in `src/lib/validation/` for all auth and dashboard types
## Data Pipeline (`scripts/`)
`npm run populate` runs: derive → judge → sync-to-kv
- `derive-evaluations.ts` — rule-based metrics (tool_correctness, evaluation_latency, task_completion) - `judge-evaluations.ts` — LLM-based metrics (relevance, coherence, faithfulness, hallucination) - `sync-to-kv.ts` — delta sync aggregates to Cloudflare KV (priority: meta/agent > metrics > trends > traces)
Requires parent `dist/` — run `npm run build` in observability-toolkit first.
## Deployment
Two Cloudflare Workers serve the dashboard API (same KV namespace): - `quality-metrics-api` — production - `obs-toolkit-quality-metrics-api` — wrangler.toml default
Deploy both after worker changes: ```bash npx wrangler deploy npx wrangler deploy --name quality-metrics-api ```
